Millions of people 27 to stay at home, so some experts have suggested this crisis may create the conditions for a baby boom. However, some have predicted that the birthrate may very likely decline 28 economic and social instability. Actually, the answer might differ in different countries. Take Indonesia for instance. The shutdown 29 has caused a stop for providing free birth control pills. The family planning agency had to make door-to-door visits and 30 pills. On the contrary, many women in the United States say they are likely to suspend their plan of having children, for they tend to lose or leave their jobs when 31 their spouses. European countries have similar results: over 50% women claim they would delay having children. For countries like these, the governments could provide incentives to support young couples.

questions.q: Based on the floor guide and the conversation, which of the following inferences is correct?
options: Charlie and his family could enjoy Japanese food in this department store.
Jessica may buy an LV bag and her facial cream on the same floor.
Jessica and Charlie’s daughter, Michelle, could go to the toilet herself.

Charlie could read at the cafe while waiting outside the nursing room. ▲ 閱讀下文,回答第 37-41 題 Born in Taiwan, Andre Chiang was named the Rising Chef of the Year for 2009 at the World Gourmet Summit Awards of Excellence. He was only 33 years old then. The characteristics of being mentally strong, hardworking and goal-oriented make him become extraordinary in the field. In high school, he volunteered to work in one famous French restaurant in Taipei only to gain precious experiences. Inspired by the then-French-chef, he decided to dedicate his career to French cuisine. He worked hard and saved a big portion of his salary to buy the latest magazines and books about cooking. When Andre was 20, he became the youngest chef of French cuisine in Taiwan. However, he was not contented. He gave up his handsome-paid job, sold his motorbike and flew to France to work at the three Michelin-starred restaurant Le Jardin des Sens. In his first year working in that restaurant, he worked from 5 am till midnight every day but got no pay. He never complained about it; instead, he was grateful for being able to work and learn in the “dream kitchen.” With a strong will and passion, he survived the first year even though he didn’t speak any French. He continued to work six more years in Le Jardin des Sens until his bosses assigned him to extend new branch restaurants in Asia, including Tokyo, Bangkok, Shanghai and Singapore. Even though Andre has got a really tight schedule every day, he has kept his reading habit. In his autobiography, Andre recalled, “I seldom read recipes, which might limit my ideas and curb my creativity. Rather, I read books about architecture, arts and history so as to enrich myself.” Through his experiences and reading, he came up with the “Octo-philosophy,” in which he used eight elements, or concepts, to make up his dishes. He always knew what his next goal was. In 2014, he returned to his hometown Taipei, and opened a brand new restaurant RAW. The restaurant was named the best restaurant in Taiwan and ranked number 24 in Asia in 2017. Now he dedicates his time not only to running his own business, but also to passing on what he has learned to the next generation in Taiwan.
questions.explanation: 根據上述樓層指南及對話,下列哪一項推論正確? (A) 因為讀了食譜可能會扼殺他的創意。 (A) 查理和他的家人可以在這間百貨公司享用日本料 (B) 因為最好的食譜都只從師傅傳給徒弟。 理。 (C) 因為書寫食譜的作者並不夠好。 (B) 潔西卡可以在同一層樓買到 LV 包及她的臉霜。 (D) 因為許多米其林摘星主廚也沒讀食譜。 (C) 潔西卡和查理的女兒, 蜜雪兒, 能夠獨自上洗手間 。 (D) 查理能夠在育嬰室外的一間咖啡店等待。 二、非選擇題 Question 37-41 I. 填充 出生於臺灣,江振誠於 2009 年世界美食高峰會上被

questions.q: What is the passage mainly about?
options: The famous cooker and the Octo-philosophy.
How to develop mental toughness and passion.
A talented young man with hard work and clear targets.
questions.explanation: 本文主旨為何? 地面 ‧詢問處 ‧花店 (A) 米其林三星餐廳指南。 1 樓 ‧酒類 ‧麵包店 (B) 有名的鍋具及八角哲學。 ‧圍巾及手帕 ‧修鞋/複製鑰匙 (C) 如何發展韌性及熱情。 地下 ‧國際美食街 ‧雜貨 (D) 一名認真且有目標的年輕才子。 1 樓 ‧捷運 ‧咖啡店

questions.q: Based on the passage, which of the following statements is TRUE?
options: Chef Andre Chiang didn’t leave Taiwan for France until he was 33 years old.
Andre had learned how to speak French and saved enough money before he headed for France.
Books about architecture and arts are important resources to trigger Andre’s creativity.
Andre had got no pay when working at the dream kitchen for seven years.

questions.explanation: 江振誠何時決定他要成為法國料理主廚? 所。最近男廁會是在哪? (A) 當他 20 歲時。 (A) 在餐廳旁。 (B) 靠近廚具區。 (B) 當他還是高中生時。 (C) 在青春服飾櫃檯後方。 (D) 在捷運車站內。 (C) 在他成為米其林三星主廚後。

questions.q: As a chef, why didn’t Andre read recipes based on the passage?
options: Because his innovation might get killed after reading recipes.
Because the best recipes were only delivered from masters to disciples.
Because the authors who wrote those recipes were not good enough.

Because many Michelin-starred chefs don’t read recipes, either. 二、非選擇題 ( 第 I 到第 III 題,每題 6 分,共 18 分 ) I. 填充 說明: ▲請依據中文提示,將試題內空格  、  答案之完整單字 ( 含提示之字首 ),分別作答於答 案卷之作答欄  、  之指定範圍內以完成句子。 ▲請勿抄題,每格限填一字,超過一字者視為錯誤,不予計分。
